notes: Package includes manifest, scenarios, validated results, readiness review, deployment package, and marketing readiness artifacts required by the delivery contract.
Authority sources are real public official sources with refresh interval, decay policy, and current review date recorded in the manifest.
Shared meta-agent delegation is documented in the manifest with specialist-owned request contracts and explicit stale, unresponsive, and low-confidence fallback behavior.
Human verification was recorded for the validated claim and no unreviewed regressions are listed in evaluation results.
